claim_boundary: Each diagnostic surface declares what it can and cannot support.

rows.does_not_support: full MNIST state-of-the-art, external benchmark leadership, or universal model quality
rows.method: rank evaluated candidates by configured held-out metric and deterministic tie-breaks
rows.supports: accepted-candidate selection within this fixed local task

rows.method: per-class metrics, calibration, probability quality, and paired comparison
rows.supports: local error analysis and uncertainty description

rows.method: deterministic no-retrain transforms applied to the fixed test split

rows.does_not_support: external signing, production SLSA compliance, or runtime intrusion detection
rows.method: local SHA-256 checks over declared inputs and generated artifacts
rows.supports: local artifact integrity evidence for the run

rows.method: deferred generated review decisions with human review required
